title: salix × gillotii
intro: Salix × gillotii, also known as the hybrid willow, is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the goat willow (Salix caprea), resulting in a plant that combines the medicinal properties of both species. The bark of the Salix × gillotii plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × gillotii include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and joint pain, and promoting relaxation. Salix × gillotii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being and reduce inflammation.
